title: Debia rosettifolia

taxonomy: Debia rosettifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Philydraceae. It is native to Australia and is also known as the frogsmouth. The classification of Debia rosettifolia at the kingdom level is Plantae, and at the order level, it is placed under the order Commelinales. Within the family Philydraceae, Debia rosettifolia is one of the several species that are found in Australia. Its classification at the genus level is Debia.
